description: Covers medical expenses for hospitalization, surgeries, and treatments.

coverage.hospitalization: Covers room charges, surgical procedures, and nursing care.
coverage.outpatient: Covers consultations, diagnostic tests, and medications.
coverage.critical_illness: Covers treatment for listed critical illnesses (e.g., cancer, stroke, kidney failure).

exclusions: Alternative medicine not listed in coverage
user_responsibilities: Provide valid ID and health history
